User Story: As a guest, I want to scan a QR at the event to open its photo space.
As a guest, I want to browse public event photos without signing up.
As a guest, I want to log in with my phone number + OTP to find my photos.
As a guest, I want social login for a fast one-tap sign-in.
As a guest, I want to take a selfie to find my photos without full signup.
As a guest, I want to take a selfie so AI shows every photo I'm in.
As a guest, I want a personal gallery of all photos featuring me.
As a guest, I want to add another selfie to improve match accuracy.
As a guest, I want to opt out so my face isn't used for matching.
As a guest, I want to browse all shared event photos.
As a guest, I want to filter by moment (ceremony, dance) to find highlights.
As a guest, I want full-screen swipe viewing of photos.
As a guest, I want to upload my own photos so the couple sees my POV.
As a guest, I want to snap and post directly from the event.
As a guest, I want to see if my upload is pending/approved by the host.
As a guest, I want to download the photos I'm in.
As a guest, I want to multi-select and download several photos.
As a guest, I want to share photos of me to Instagram/WhatsApp.
As a guest, I want a link to my photo set to send to friends.
As a guest, I want a notification when new photos of me are added.
